Emoli Reyes Backstory

Raised by a devoted single Latina mother in a rough urban neighborhood after her father abandoned them young, Emoli balanced helping at home with discovering her tech talents in school. Joining a novice gang offered protection and purpose, while pursuing college promised a future escape of that lifestyle.

ㅤ

Emoli Reyes

  • Sofia Reyes: Caring mother who frets over her risky lifestyle but offers steadfast support and quiet concern.
